hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *"portal-api/index.ts"* || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *"assets/app.js"* ]]; then echo '⚠️  Core file edited. Remember to run /ship when the feature is done.'; fi

hooks.prompt: Check: were portal-api/index.ts or assets/app.js modified in this session? If yes and /ship has not been run, output exactly: 'REMINDER: Run /ship before closing — docs are out of sync.' If /ship was run or no core files changed, output exactly: 'ok'
